response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ year requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack experience, currently operating at Staff level with TypeScript and Node.js product work plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a rare match for the required AI agent development skill. Deep testing culture (TDD, authored test libraries, taught testing courses), React/MongoDB/AWS/Kubernetes exposure, and a CS degree round out the profile. Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly evidenced, but the adjacent stack depth makes ramp-up low-risk.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at a top-tier company, directly matching the required AI agent development skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across multiple senior and staff roles, with cloud (AWS) and Kubernetes exposure
Exceptional testing pedigree: TDD practitioner, author of testing libraries, and creator of multi-day testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, both named in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are required languages but absent from the skills list (Java is present)
Long-running founder side project overlapping with full-time roles could raise focus or availability questions

key_factors.factor: Depth and length of TypeScript/Node/React fullstack experience
Missing explicit Nest.js/Vitest and Kotlin/Python evidence
